reasoning: Your limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, as shown by the 25W drop from 5-min to 20-min power. We can address this directly through this structured session. Considering your recent low-intensity ride, we will build intensity to simulate the demands of your Alpine Loop goal.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x10 minute over-unders: 2 min at 201W-218W, 3 min at 242W-256W, 5 min at 209W-223W. 3 min easy spin recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
